positive: A whimsical celestial forest scene designed for apparel printing. The composition must feature a large, highly stylized crescent moon positioned centrally, surrounded by intricate constellations and stylized woodland creatures (owls, deer, foxes) interacting with glowing flora. Style: Elegant, high-contrast modern linework illustration with a strong vector aesthetic. Color Palette: Limited jewel tones (deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green) accented by metallic gold foil effects. Composition must be centralized, symmetrical, and clean, emphasizing thick outlines and crisp separation for screen printing. Concept: Nighttime magic meeting botany.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, messy background
